nasb.text: always in my prayers making request, if perhaps now at last by the will of God I may succeed in coming to you.

esv.text: always in my prayers, asking that somehow by God’s will I may now at last succeed in coming to you.

cnv.text: 常常在禱告中懇切祈求，也許我可以照著他的旨意，終於能夠順利地到你們那裡去。

csbs.text: 在我的祷告中总是祈求，或许可以照着神的旨意，终有一天能顺利地到你们那里去；
